title: bromus eximius subsp. umbraticus
intro: Bromus eximius subsp. umbraticus, also known as Umbraticus Brome, is a subspecies of the Bromus eximius plant, a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Umbraticus Brome include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
